name: QA 1689
description:

statusMessage:
output mismatch (see 1689.out.bad)
3,4c3,4
< pmproxy.control.debug PMID: 4.0.1 [Debug flag]
<     Data Type: 32-bit int  InDom: PM_INDOM_NULL 0xffffffff
---
> pmproxy.control.debug PMID: 4.0.1 [Debug options]
>     Data Type: string  InDom: PM_INDOM_NULL 0xffffffff
7c7,10
< See pmdbg(1).  pmstore into this metric to change the debug value.
---
> See pmdbg(1).  pmstore into this metric to change the debug option(s)
> 
> Note that if this PMDA is installed as a DSO agent, the debug options
> are shared with pmcd(1)
Check local PMCD is still alive ...
